name: rung_24_robustness_hard_passive_retarget
utterances: Nora is the parent of Omar.
Omar is the parent of Priya.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
To correct the record, retract parent(omar, priya).
The corrected version is this: Omar is the parent of Quinn.
Quinn is the parent of Priya.
Is Nora an ancestor of Priya now?
